summary: Iteration 43 - All IB Pushed Data integration and Startup Modal enhancements verified. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented, but StartupModal handles this gracefully as warning

startup_modal_z_index.details: z-index is 9999, modal covers entire screen including header (position: fixed, inset: 0px)

startup_modal_detailed_explanations.details: 6 detailed descriptions present under each feature card

startup_modal_ib_gateway_check.details: System status includes 'Checking IB Gateway connection...' with data-testid='startup-process-ibpusher'

ib_pushed_data_api.POST /api/ib/push-data: PASS - Receives and stores data from local IB pusher
ib_pushed_data_api.GET /api/ib/pushed-data: PASS - Returns quotes, account, positions with connected status
ib_pushed_data_api.GET /api/ib/pushed-quote/{symbol}: PASS - Returns specific quote from pushed data
ib_pushed_data_api.staleness_check: PASS - connected=false when data older than 30 seconds

useCommandCenterData_integration.details: Hook fetches from /api/ib/pushed-data with fallback to direct IB and Alpaca

IBTradingPage_integration.details: fetchAccountData and fetchPositions use pushed data with fallback to direct IB

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: /api/market-intel/early-morning-report returns 404 - not critical as StartupModal handles gracefully
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ib_pushed_data.py - New test file for IB Pushed Data endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ for IB pushed data tests

mocked_apis.note: IB pusher returns empty when not running, which is expected behavior

context_for_next_testing_agent: IB Pushed Data integration fully working: POST /api/ib/push-data receives data, GET /api/ib/pushed-data returns it. StartupModal enhanced with z-index:9999, 6 feature highlight badges, detailed explanations, and IB Gateway status check. useCommandCenterData and IBTradingPage both integrate with pushed-data endpoint with proper fallbacks. Note: /api/market-intel/early-morning-report returns 404 but is handled gracefully.
